title: Becoming a Mantra Sales Partner
description: Help introduce organizations that may benefit from Mantra's Employee Assistance Programs while earning rewards for successful referrals.

info.not_sell_title: You are NOT expected to sell.
info.not_sell_desc: Your role is simply to introduce potential companies that could benefit from Mantra's services. Once an introduction is made, the Business Development team handles: Meetings, Product demos, Negotiations, Closing. You simply help start the conversation.

sections.participate_subtitle: You don't need to commit to anything right now. Here are some examples of how our partners help:

help_items.intro_companies_desc: Recommend organizations that may benefit from EAP.
help_items.make_intros_desc: Email, LinkedIn or personal introductions are enough.
help_items.share_opps_desc: Mention Mantra when appropriate in your network.
help_items.connect_dm_desc: Introduce HR teams, founders, managers or wellness leaders.

timeline.identify_desc: Think of organizations in your network.
timeline.intro_desc: Start the conversation via email or LinkedIn.
timeline.biz_team_desc: We handle demos, negotiations, and closing.
timeline.signup_desc: The organization officially partners with Mantra.
timeline.earn_desc: Receive your financial commission and Mantra Points.

participate_items.intro_client_desc: Introduce MantraCare to a client or professional in your network.
participate_items.rec_companies_desc: Share organizations where Employee Assistance Programs (EAPs) could be valuable.
participate_items.make_intro_desc: Connect our team with an HR leader or decision-maker through LinkedIn or email.
participate_items.learn_more_desc: Not ready today? That's okay—you can explore the program and participate whenever you're comfortable.

celebration.title: Application Received!
celebration.subtitle: Our Business Development team will be in touch shortly.
